channel.title: Elon-Musk on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Elon-Musk on Archive 03

item.title: How High Can Dogecoin ($DOGE) Go This Year?
item.description: As expectations for an altcoin season grow with the decline in Bitcoin dominance, we explore the future of the original memecoin, Dogecoin ($DOGE). We analyze its growth potential from the massive catalyst of X (formerly Twitter) payment system integration against its inherent risk of lacking fundamentals, forecasting its price targets for the second half of the year.

item.title: Tesla ($TSLA): A Good Time to Invest? Analyzing Opportunities & Risks
item.description: Tesla’s future: An AI robotics company or a car manufacturer in crisis? Kurumi presents a grand vision of Robotaxis and Optimus, while Mikael points to declining sales and CEO risk. We conduct an in-depth diagnosis of the opportunities and weaknesses of investing in Tesla.
